headline: Planner handoffs now carry richer entry-aware notes, traits, and sample defaults into the form.
notes: City and sample CTAs can now pass duration, companion, style, notes, local mode, and traveler-trait hints into Planner.
Planner entry presets now merge those richer handoff values and show them inside the entry-context card.
Traveler-trait preset matching now resolves meaning across languages instead of relying on exact localized labels.
